patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73 (DOB documented as 05/05/1952 in multiple sources; an alternate DOB 07/21/1954 is present in one source). Active problems documented include Mixed dyslipidemia, Essential hypertension, Postoperative/Unspecified anemia, and Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major planned procedure: COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY scheduled 02/21/2025. Notable laboratory abnormalities: Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL (07/03/2023), Iron 41 (L) ug/dL and Iron Saturation 15 (L)% (07/03/2023), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2 (07/03/2023), Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL and VLDL Cholesterol Cal 32 (H) mg/dL (07/03/2023). Recent blood pressure recorded 128/78 (01/11/2025). Multiple care team members are listed including Hand, Hoyet A, MD (Singing River) and Hershey, Curtis L, MD (Piedmont). Several social history entries for tobacco use are present and conflict across sources. PHQ-9 and PHQ-2 scores were 0 on 03/28/2023.
